request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the costs? My neighbor lost their job when the base closed for 'burden-sharing' cuts. Meanwhile, our 'partners' aren't pulling their weight. We need to put America first - real security means fair deals, not endless giveaways. #AlliancesWithConditions
